message:
test(cli): add delete subcommand to CLI argument parsing test coverage

Adds the 'delete' subcommand to the exhaustive CLI argument parsing test
matrix, ensuring parse_cli_args(["delete", "doc-id"]) is exercised alongside
search, explain, and completions.
